scene.message: Ayase: What was that...{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Another ally{nl} joins us.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Ally?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Hm, most likely.{waitkey}{clearbox}That's probably how he came{nl} to use a Persona.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Yes, most likely.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Ehhh?!{waitkey}No waaay!{waitkey}Unbelievaaable!!{waitkey}{clearbox}So then, so then,{nl} out of Ayase's belly too,{waitkey}a beep{wait_fr:15} goes{wait_fr:15} beep{wait_fr:15}?!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: A happy fellow.{waitkey}{ret}
Right, {ctl0f:1}?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
